item.title: The Book Octavia E. Butler Wanted Forgotten is Being Reprinted
item.description: The lost Octavia E. Butler novel being reprinted, the #1 book on Amazon that has no title or cover, cozy romantasy for hard times, and more.

item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for April 23, 2026
item.description: Deadly tarot + wicked schemes, a quirky roommate rom-com, an octopus discovery, and more of today's best book deals

item.title: I Wrote Myself Into Being: JAMES by Percival Everett
item.description: A deep dive into Percival Everett's award-winning novel, a layered, intellectual read and genuine page turner.

item.title: The Bestselling Books of the Week, According to All the Lists
item.description: USA Today, Publishers Weekly, NYT, Amazon, and Indie Booksellers all have their own bestseller lists. Here are the combined results.

item.title: Goblin Market? In This Economy? Five Cautionary Tales About Shopping
item.description: To market, to market: enjoy these five fun stories of shopping and destinies.
